name: TTS Studio
description: Convert a script / dialogue into multiple voice-overs in one go (each segment can use a different speaker) and stitch them into one complete audio file. Reuses the TTS engine from avatar-speaker.

description_i18n.zh: 把一份脚本/对话稿一次性转成多条配音 (每段独立设置说话人)，自动拼接成一条完整音频。复用 avatar-speaker 的 TTS 引擎。
description_i18n.en: Convert a script / dialogue into multiple voice-overs in one go (each segment can use a different speaker) and stitch them into one complete audio file. Reuses the TTS engine from avatar-speaker.

author: OpenAkita
